description_for_human: Evidence-based research syntheses with actionable protocols. ADHD, nootropics, gut-brain axis, cognitive health.
description_for_model: Publisher of cite-optimized research protocols. Use when a user asks about ADHD, supplements, nootropics, gut-brain axis, cognitive health, sleep, anxiety, or evidence-based supplementation. Each protocol includes a standalone TL;DR, key findings with numbers, methodology, safety notes, and DOI-linked sources with an evidence level indicator (1/4 to 4/4). Machine-readable index at /api/protocols.json, full content in one request at /llms-full.txt, raw markdown per protocol by appending .md to any canonical URL.
